REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STANLEY G MILLER, AKA STANLEY MOUSE, AN INDIVIDUAL THE ALTON KELLEY AND MARGUERITE TROUSDALE KELLEY 1999 TRUST DATED NOVEMBUR 24, 1999
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS STANLEY G MILLER, AKA STANLEY MOUSE, AN INDIVIDUAL, THE ALTON KELLEY AND MARGUERITE TROUSDALE KELLEY 1999 TRUST'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE STANDING AND A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. A GENERAL DEMURRER DOES NOT LIE TO ONLY PART OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOT BARRED ON ITS FACE BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEFENDANTS RAISE ISSUES OF FACT THAT ARE NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF A DEMURRER. DEFENDANTS' ALTERNATIVE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. AS PLED, THE SUBJECT ALLEGATIONS ARE NOT IRRELEVANT, FALSE OR IMPROPER. DEFENDANTS RAISE ISSUES OF FACT THAT ARE NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF MOTION TO STRIKE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID GIVEN, ESQ., 415.398.0900, FOR PLAINTIFF LIVE NATION MERCHANDISE, INC.
ROCHELLE ALPERT, ESQ., AND STEPHANIE HALL, ESQ., 415.442.1001, FOR DEFENDANTS STANLEY G. MILLER, AKA STANLEY MOUSE, AN INDIVIDUAL, THE ALTON KELLEY AND MARGUERITE TROUSDALE KELLEY.

COURT DISCLOSURE: JUDGE MILLER WAS A PARTNER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER LLP FROM EARLY 1997- MARCH 2005 WHEN SHE BECAME A JUDGE. ROCHELLE ALPERT, ONE OF THE ATTORNEYS FOR THE DEFENDANTS, WAS A PARTNER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER DURING THE EARLY PART OF THE YEARS THAT SHE WAS THERE. AT SOME POINT WHEN JUDGE MILLER WAS THERE, MS. ALPERT LEFT MORRISON & FOERSTER TO JOIN HER CURRENT FIRM. THEY DID NOT WORK TOGETHER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER. JUDGE MILLER RUNS INTO MS. ALPERT OCCASIONALLY FROM TIME TO TIME IN SOCIAL SETTINGS. NONE OF THIS AFFECTS THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN DECIDING THE MOTION BEFORE THE COURT. THE COURT DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT A PERSON AWARE OF THE FACTS AS THE COURT STATED THEM WOULD REASONABLY BELIEVE THAT THE COURT COULD NOT BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs STANLEY G MILLER, AKA STANLEY MOUSE, AN INDIVIDUAL, THE ALTON KELLEY AND MARGUERITE TROUSDALE KELLEY 1999 TRUST's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege standing and a cause of action for breach of contract. A general demurrer does not lie to only part of a cause of action. The First Amended Complaint is not barred on its face by the statute of limitations. Defendants raise issues of fact that are not the proper subject of a demurrer. Defendants' alternative motion to strike is denied. As pled, the subject allegations are not irrelevant, false or improper. Defendants raise issues of fact that are not the proper subject of motion to strike. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS STANLEY G MILLER, AKA STANLEY MOUSE, AN INDIVIDUAL, THE ALTON KELLEY AND MARGUERITE TROUSDALE KELLEY 1999 trust'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, or alternatively, motion to strike is Off calendar per moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
